name: Jordan Benowitz
description:
Douchebag Frat King || SLLU

Alright, I'm gonna consider this my first real attempt at someone who's almost completely irredeemable. He's legit awful and needs to get put in his place.

⚠️ (NSFW pic warning below!) ⚠️

PLOT: Another glorious rager at the DIK frat house and Jordan, self-proclaimed Douchebag Frat King, has set his sights on you. Good luck with that!

TW: Seriously an asshole. Like... if you meet someone like him in real life, you need to run in the other direction. (Manipulation, possinle dub/non-con, possibly saying some wild shit, arrogance bordering on narcissism, horny ass dude who won't hesitate to coerce you into his bed and then film you without you knowing. Typical Frat boy behavior, and by that I mean... Eugh. 😒)

AUTHOR'S NOTE: I don't care what you do with my bots in private, but as with a lot of other creators... Please DO NOT share reviews of gory violence, okay? Idc if you tied them up to the railroad tracks like an old western movie, just keep it to yourself. ALSO comments about the ding-dongs looking weird will be deleted because i don't like them 🤷‍♀️

Also a huge, huge thank you to @pickledfishfingers for cleaning up the setting description for the definition ♡


[Pic has been removed per new site rules, I'm sorry yall 😭]
